mapper.select: SELECT id, client_id AS clientId, client_name AS clientName, client_secret_hash AS clientSecretHash, client_type AS clientType, allowed_grant_types AS allowedGrantTypes, allowed_scopes AS allowedScopes, access_token_lifetime_ms AS accessTokenLifetimeMs, refresh_token_lifetime_ms AS refreshTokenLifetimeMs, dicom_server_id AS dicomServerId, is_active AS isActive FROM oauth2_clients WHERE client_id = #{clientId} AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1

SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM oauth2_clients c INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_servers s ON s.id = c.dicom_server_id AND s.is_active = 1 WHERE c.client_id = #{clientId} AND c.client_type = 'CONFIDENTIAL' AND c.is_active = TRUE AND c.dicom_server_id IS NOT NULL AND POSITION('client_credentials' IN c.allowed_grant_types) > 0 AND POSITION('pacs.api' IN c.allowed_scopes) > 0 )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oauth2_clients ( client_id, client_name, client_secret_hash, client_type, allowed_grant_types, allowed_scopes, access_token_lifetime_ms, refresh_token_lifetime_ms, dicom_server_id, is_active, created, modified ) VALUES ( #{clientId}, #{clientName}, #{clientSecretHash}, 'CONFIDENTIAL', 'client_credentials', 'pacs.api', 900000, 2592000000, #{dicomServerId}, TRUE, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (client_id) DO UPDATE SET client_name = EXCLUDED.client_name, client_secret_hash = EXCLUDED.client_secret_hash, client_type = EXCLUDED.client_type, allowed_grant_types = EXCLUDED.allowed_grant_types, allowed_scopes = EXCLUDED.allowed_scopes, access_token_lifetime_ms = EXCLUDED.access_token_lifetime_ms, refresh_token_lifetime_ms = EXCLUDED.refresh_token_lifetime_ms, dicom_server_id = EXCLUDED.dicom_server_id, is_active = TRUE, modified = NOW()
